description: Create a content slide on authenticity and trust in online brand activity with a two-column text layout and a large supporting visual.

header.headline: The onus is now on brands to make sure that their online activity builds trust rather than adding to hesitation.

left.body: “Authentic” was Merriam-Webster’s word of the year in 2023. With the rise of artificial intelligence and its impact on deep-fake videos, actors’ contracts, academic honesty and a vast number of other topics, the line between real and fake has become blurred. Authenticity and its growing importance to internet users is more than just something brands should aspire to be. It’s something they must actively do as part of every interaction with their customers.

right.body: Being authentic and trustworthy is a win-win, because when customers can trust an organization, they will engage with it—without hesitation.
